title: alsine corniculata
intro: Alsine corniculata, also known as sweet grass or creeping cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alsine corniculata include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as aiding in digestion and relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Alsine corniculata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
